name: Configurable Product List
description: Controls the catalog image type and product information displayed by the PLP grid.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Configurable Product List
attribute_definition_groups.description: Controls the catalog image type and product information displayed by the PLP grid.

attribute_definitions.name: Catalog image type
attribute_definitions.description: Catalog view type used as the primary image for each product.

attribute_definitions.name: Show badges
attribute_definitions.description: Shows product badges such as new or sale.

attribute_definitions.name: Show wishlist action
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the action used to add a product to the wishlist.

attribute_definitions.name: Show quick add
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the quick-add action when the shopper interacts with a product.

attribute_definitions.name: Show color swatches
attribute_definitions.description: Shows color variations using swatch images when available.

attribute_definitions.name: Show brand
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the configured product or storefront brand.

attribute_definitions.name: Show category
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the primary category above the product name.

attribute_definitions.name: Show product name
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the product name and link.

attribute_definitions.name: Show rating
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the product rating and review count.

attribute_definitions.name: Show price
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the current price and, when available, the previous price.

attribute_definitions.name: Show promotions
attribute_definitions.description: Shows promotional messages associated with the product price.

attribute_definitions.name: Maximum swatches
attribute_definitions.description: Maximum number of visible color swatches per product (between 1 and 12).

attribute_definitions.name: Additional attributes
attribute_definitions.description: Up to 5 custom attributes separated by lines or commas. Use material|Material or season=Season. The c_ prefix is optional.
